title: PIVOWorld RP
description: This is a PIVOWorld server resource pack, made on the basis of KSEPSP and modded for our server with a bunch of different icons and dies.
body: ![PIVOWorlds](https://wiki.pwworlds.ru/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F2694660148-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FR4JUtIjmwjkV1Hd4rdH0%252Fuploads%252FouPmV041D8eSIhYb1I1y%252F2026-01-09_20.02.32.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D1895cdce-3495-4afd-9573-0b9027fec567&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=98a97224&sv=2) # Hello everyone, this is the server resource pack of the PIVOWorld project Why do I need to download it? > It's very simple, it's needed for visibility of objects and RP moments on the PeWorld server > > You will also be able to see the roles of the players, as well as the tab and all the servers and the rest of the design for a convenient and enjoyable game How do I download it? > Just download the file and put it in a folder .minecraft\resourcepacks > > The version of your game client must be 1.21.1 or 1.21 > > ТIt is also advisable to download our assembly of mods, without it many models simply will not be visible Also, versions of this resource pack will be updated here in a convenient format to make it easier to download, without any problems. > Documentation with all renames - [https://definitelyawhale.github.io/ksepsp_website/](https://definitelyawhale.github.io/ksepsp_website/) > [Discord PIVOWorlds](https://discord.gg/pVM7BHyATG) _the resource pack is made based on the ready-made KSEPSP pack, but many models have been removed or replaced with custom ones_
